goal: Make the discovery lifecycle understandable enough that a PM can explain one item and the broader discovery stage in the same review.

visual_specs.purpose: Explain the item journey from intake through PRD handoff.
visual_specs.primary_message: One item should remain traceable across artifacts, gates, and downstream readiness.

visual_specs.purpose: Show what the stage aggregate view summarizes for active discovery items.
visual_specs.primary_message: Stage counts matter only when they can be grounded in item-level evidence.

benchmark_hypotheses: An item timeline reduces the time needed to explain what happened during discovery.
A discovery-stage snapshot helps leaders identify blocked work without losing the item context.
